reasoning: Targeting your lactate clearance and aerobic base deficiency, this workout builds fatigue resistance crucial for the Alpine Loop. Your last ride showed a steady state at 60% FTP, which we’ll now advance into targeted over-under intervals.

suggested_sets.description: 5 x (6 min @ 242-256W, 3 min @ 201-218W) simulating the power demands of Emigration Canyon
